name: skeptical_verify_vote

payload.name: skeptical_verify_vote
payload.prompt_template: Carefully examine the image. Do NOT assume an object is present just because it would be typical for this scene. Only answer Yes if you can directly and clearly see the object itself in the image. If you cannot point to it, answer No. {prompt}

summary: [mcnemar + e-value (paired binary)] effect=+0.0000 (A=B) CI=-0.1000..+0.1000, e=0.53 -> inconclusive [no_effect, coverage=100%]
